summary: Profile Page Feature Testing Complete - ALL 13 TESTS PASSED. Verified all 5 requested features for ProfilePage.jsx: real name display, empty logros/historial states, configuración with notifications toggle and password change, ayuda section, and logout buttons.

test_credentials.quick_login: Click 'Ingresar' button (no credentials required - allows empty login)
test_credentials.registration: Fill nombre, apellido, email, password, confirm password and click 'Crear cuenta gratis'

details: No real backend - all data in localStorage

seed_data_creation: None required - users created via registration form
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile page fully functional. Key localStorage keys: je_auth_session (contains user session with nombre, apellido, email), je_auth_users (registered users array), je_notifications_enabled (notification preference). Quick login saves session WITHOUT nombre/apellido (shows 'Mi perfil'). Registration saves session WITH nombre/apellido (shows real name). All data-testid attributes working: profile-menu-logros, profile-menu-historial, profile-menu-config, profile-menu-ayuda, logros-empty, historial-empty, config-section, ayuda-section, profile-user-name, notif-toggle, pw-current, pw-new, pw-confirm, pw-save-btn, config-logout-btn, profile-logout-btn, ayuda-email-btn.
